title: No More Mace
description: Gives you the ability to enable or disable Mace anytime
body:
## No More Mace

No More Mace is a lightweight, toggleable Minecraft datapack that completely disables the Mace weapon introduced in Minecraft 1.21+.
Perfect for servers, SMPs, or worlds where the Mace feels too overpowered, too chaotic, or just doesn’t fit your gameplay style.


**🔨 Features**
- Fully toggleable
Enable or disable the anti‑mace system at any time:
/function mace:enable (Mace Disabler working)
/function mace:disable (Mace disabler Off means yuu can use mace)

- Automatic Mace Removal
When enabled, the datapack:
- Removes the mace from all players
- Deletes dropped mace items
- Blocks mace crafting via recipe override
- Clean Reload Message
Running /reload displays a colorful message with clickable commands and a link to more content.
- Lightweight & Lag‑Free
Uses simple scoreboard logic and a single tick function.
Zero performance impact — perfect for any world size.
- 1.21+ Compatible
Works on Minecraft Java Edition 1.21 → 26.2
